title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained Llama 2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, etc. runner with a REST API and CLI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API (npm: ollama).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API (PyPI: ollama).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama as an LLM or chat model.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (Docker ready).

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Hugging-Face-like CLI helper to search, pull and run HF models through Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot (sublime-ollama)
summary: Unofficial Sublime-Text plugin that adds local AI completions via Ollama.

title: ollama-vscode (CodeGPT extension)
summary: VS Code extension that supports Ollama as a local provider for inline chat & completion.

title: ollama-rag (PrivateGPT fork)
summary: PrivateGPT now ships an Ollama backend option for fully local RAG.

title: ollama-helm (k8s)
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose snippets for CPU & GPU (cuda/rocm).

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat and generate code with Ollama inside the editor.

title: ollama-csharp (ollama-sharp)
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama REST API with strongly-typed chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-rust (ollama-rs)
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-go (go-ollama)
summary: Community Go client for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as Generators or Chatters in pipelines.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify orchestration platform added Ollama as a local model provider for no-code LLM apps.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot (reddit showcase)
summary: Developer shares a minimal Flask app that combines Ollama + Chroma for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-hackernews discussion
summary: HN thread comparing Ollama vs llama.cpp performance and GPU utilisation tips.

title: ollama-streamlit-chat
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat UI that talks to Ollama over REST.
